nasb.text: How shall I admonish you? To what shall I compare you, O daughter of Jerusalem? To what shall I liken you as I comfort you, O virgin daughter of Zion? For your ruin is as vast as the sea; Who can heal you?

esv.text: What can I say for you, to what compare you, O daughter of Jerusalem? What can I liken to you, that I may comfort you, O virgin daughter of Zion? For your ruin is vast as the sea; who can heal you?

cnv.text: 耶路撒冷的居民哪，我怎樣向你說明呢？用甚麼與你比較呢？ 錫安的居民哪，我們用甚麼跟你相比，好安慰你呢？ 你的裂口像海那樣大，誰能醫治你呢？

ccb.text: 耶路撒冷啊，我该说什么呢？ 谁能与你的苦难相比呢？ 锡安啊，我用什么话语才能安慰你呢？ 你的伤口深如海洋， 谁能医治你呢？
